task: Extract the AWS account ID from an ARN string like 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket/path/to/object'
solution_criteria: Regex pattern must correctly extract the 12-digit account ID from various ARN formats, handling cases where account ID may be empty/omitted

task: Create a Python function that accepts an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no consecutive hyphens)
solution_criteria: Function must validate all AWS S3 bucket naming rules and return a boolean, handling edge cases like buckets starting/ending with hyphens

task: Generate a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS Lambda execution IAM role with basic VPC execution permissions
solution_criteria: JSON must be valid CloudFormation syntax with proper AssumeRolePolicyDocument and managed policy ARN for Lambda VPC execution
